sessions.title: Add users table to Prisma schema

s1.content: Add a users table to the Prisma schema with email, name, and role fields.

I'll add the `User` model to your Prisma schema.

```prisma
model User {
  id    String @id @default(cuid())
  email String @unique
  name  String
  role  Role   @default(USER)
}

enum Role {
  USER
  ADMIN
}
```

I've also run the migration.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.result:
Migration applied: add_users

Your database is now in sync.

s1.content: Can you add an index on the email field?
Done! Added `@@index([email])` to the User model and ran the migration.

s2.content: The auth middleware returns 401 for valid tokens. Can you debug it?

Found the issue — algorithm mismatch between `RS256` and `HS256`.

```ts
// Before (broken)
jwt.verify(token, secret, { algorithms: ['HS256'] })

// After (fixed)
jwt.verify(token, publicKey, { algorithms: ['RS256'] })
```

Fixed and tests pass.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.result:
PASS src/__tests__/auth.test.ts
  ✓ valid token (5ms)
  ✓ expired token (3ms)

Tests: 2 passed

s3.content:
## Users API

### `GET /api/users`

Returns a paginated list of users.

**Query Parameters:**
| Param | Type | Default |
|-------|------|--------|
| `page` | number | 1 |
| `limit` | number | 20 |

### `POST /api/users`

Creates a new user.

```json
{ "email": "user@example.com", "name": "John", "role": "USER" }
```

### `GET /api/users/:id`

Returns a single user by ID.

s4.content:
Reviewed PR #42. Approved with minor suggestions:

2. **Line 78**: Consider an index on `created_at`
